arts.ttl: Lazio table £11.5m offer for out-of-favour Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei - as Renato Veiga and Ben Chilwell attract interest
arts.sum: Renato Veiga is pushing to join Juventus to further his chances of playing for Portugal, while Everton are interested in a number of Chelsea players including left-back Ben Chilwell.

arts.ttl: Lazio Submit New & Improved Offer for Chelsea Wantaway
arts.sum: Lazio refuse to give up on their attempts to lure Cesare Casadei, so they have reportedly formulated a new offer that could satisfy Chelsea’s demands. The Background The Blues are requesting €15 million to part ways with the 22-year-old who has recently emerged as the Biancocelesti’s priority target. Lazio offered to split this figure between […] The post Lazio Submit New & Improved Offer for Chelsea Wantaway appeared first on The Laziali.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Cesare Casadei subject of 'fresh formal bid' from new Serie A club, amid reports of Torino interest
arts.sum: Lazio are reportedly in the process of submitting a formal bid for Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei, amid interest from Torino and an unnamed Premier League club.
